# Transcrição: Communication_skills_make_you_VISIBLE

- **Duração:** 01:17

## [00:00 - 01:17]

When I was growing up it was pretty rough. We were poor, my grades were awful, I was terrible at school and if you asked anybody who knew me at the time, they would have told you that this kid was going to have a rubbish future. The situation I was in was this situation here where I had a lot to offer but I couldn't show anyone. I didn't know how to show anyone and this is what Invisible is all about. So the moment I started to improve my ability to communicate, I started to become visible. Heck, I started to shine. And for me now to be working with companies like Google, Microsoft, LinkedIn and Facebook, it blows my frickin' mind. And you have to ask the question, is Vin that amazing? And the answer is no. Has he done anything that incredible? And the answer is also no. But has he learned how to communicate and amplify the best parts of who he is? Yeah, I have learned how to do that. You have so much potential. There's so much uniqueness in you and you have talents that you haven't discovered yet. And until you learn how to amplify the best parts of who you are, none of the world will see that. You will be invisible. And here's the big catch. Here's the big catch. You are the only person that can unlock your gifts, that can unlock your talents, that can unlock your potential. No one but you has the ability to unlock it all.
